query_normalized: assessing the validity of statistical significance in randomized controlled trials with missing data statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the validity of statistical testing (specifically Type I error control and power) in the presence of missing data, which is the core mechanism and variable of the user's question regarding Randomized Controlled Trials.
